paytable_cluster_bands.comment: Cluster size bands: k=5, k=6-8, k=9-11, k=12-14, k=15+. Payout multiplied by current cascade multiplier.

multiplier_ladder.comment: Applied to next win in same spin chain. Capped at 10x and sustained.

player_state_map.tension: slow reel deceleration + anticipation stacks before first drop
player_state_map.peak_anticipation: 5+ cascade chain at 10x sustained, sound + screen-shake ramps
player_state_map.climax: high-k cluster on T1/T2 at 10x multiplier (single-spin top hit ~5000x bet)
player_state_map.re_engagement: free spins climbing multiplier (no reset during FS) loops the loop

pseudocode: Each spin: drop initial 7x7 grid from reel strips. Flood-fill 4-connected clusters (WILD substitutes but does not start a cluster). Any cluster >= k_min pays via paytable_cluster_bands, multiplied by current cascade multiplier (starts at 1 in base, 2 in FS). After paying, remove all winning tiles and SCAT counted at start; columns drop, refill from top using reel strip. Increment cascade multiplier to next level in ladder; recompute. Repeat until no win. 6+ SCAT in any single drop sequence trigger 10 free spins. In free spins, multiplier persists and climbs +1 per winning cascade, never resets within FS. Retrigger: 3+ SCAT adds 5 free spins.
engine_support: v0.2 (cluster + cascade + scatter + FS). v0.1 engine cannot run this; JSON spec is decision-ready.
notes: MVP #2 = cluster cascade family (Sugar Rush / Mahjong Ways cluster mode). This is the cascade anticipation deliverable Chris asked for.
